title: Multi-Region LLM Serving and KV Cache Locality

questions.question: Why is round-robin load balancing actively harmful for cached LLM inference?
questions.question_zh: 对于带缓存的 LLM 推理，为什么 round-robin 负载均衡反而是有害的？
options: A request that does not land on the node holding its prefix pays full prefill cost instead of a cache hit
Round-robin is only valid for stateful databases
options_zh: 请求如果没落到持有其前缀的节点上，就要付出完整 prefill 的代价，而不是命中缓存
round-robin 需要会话粘连
round-robin 会破坏 TLS
round-robin 只适用于有状态数据库

questions.question: What two inputs does a cache-aware router consume?
questions.question_zh: cache-aware 路由器消费哪两个输入？
options: KV-cache events from replicas and a prefix hash on the incoming request
options_zh: 随机打乱和请求大小
仅 user_id 和 tenant_id
round-robin 计数器与 TLS 密钥
来自各副本的 KV cache 事件，以及对到来请求计算的前缀哈希

questions.question: Roughly what is the TTFT gap between a cache hit and a cold prefill on a 2K-token prompt for Llama 3.3 70B FP8?
questions.question_zh: 在 Llama 3.3 70B FP8 上，2K token 的 prompt 命中缓存和冷 prefill 之间的 TTFT 大致差多少？
options_zh: 几乎相同
约 10 倍（~80 ms vs ~800 ms）
约 1.1 倍

questions.question: Why does cross-region routing not always beat regional routing for cache hits?
questions.question_zh: 为什么对缓存命中而言，跨 region 路由并不总能胜过本地 region 路由？
options: Cache-aware routing is impossible across regions
GORGO research found cache hits do not help latency
Inter-region routing is forbidden by all hyperscalers
Saved prefill can be dwarfed by network RTT, e.g. 440 ms round-trip can dwarf an 800-to-80 ms prefill saving
options_zh: 跨 region 不可能做 cache-aware 路由
GORGO 的研究发现缓存命中并不降低延迟
所有超大规模云商都禁止跨 region 路由
节省下来的 prefill 可能被网络 RTT 吞掉，例如 440 ms 的往返就能盖过 800 ms 降到 80 ms 的 prefill 节省

questions.question: What does the lesson cite as the 32% LLM DR failure driver?
questions.question_zh: 本课指出 LLM 灾备故障中 32% 的根因是什么？
options: Backups that include weights but miss tokenizer files or quantization configs
options_zh: 备份只包含权重，却漏掉了 tokenizer 文件或量化配置
region 配额耗尽
负载均衡器配置错误
备份未加密

questions.question: What does the lesson say about commercial cross-region inference offerings such as Bedrock CRI?
questions.question_zh: 本课如何评价 Bedrock CRI 等商业跨 region 推理产品？
options: They are KV-cache-aware and replace app-layer routing
They optimize availability, not TTFT, and treat inference as opaque — you still need an app-layer cache-aware router
options_zh: 它们感知 KV cache，可以替代应用层路由
只能在 us-east-1 工作
它们优化的是可用性而非 TTFT，并把推理视为不透明的黑盒 — 你仍然需要应用层的 cache-aware 路由器
GDPR 禁用它们
